cn: 請大家一心敬禮根本傳承上師
en: Please wholeheartedly pay homage to the Root Lineage Guru
For all sentient beings to be freed from suffering and attain happiness

cn: 恭請師尊蓮生活佛開示
en: We respectfully invite Living Buddha Lian-sheng, the Grand Master, to give the teaching
We will now begin the homa ritual
Next, we will proceed with the dedication of merits
We pray for the blessings of all Buddhas and Bodhisattvas
